In [[3996 BBY]], in the aftermath of [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun's]] [[Battle of Yavin 4 (Great Sith War)|defeat]] at [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] '''retook''' the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]].

==Background==
After the ultimate defeat of [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] in the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin]] system, a number of [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] forces were still at large in a galaxy reeling from years of unceasing, destructive warfare. The elimination or neutralization of their primary leadership (Kun, [[Aleema Keto]], [[Satal Keto/Legends|Satal Keto]], [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]]) dealt a severe blow to the Krath's initiative, but the entrenched holdings deep within the Empress Teta system remained for the Republic to contend with.

==The battle==
At some point after the [[Battle of Yavin 4 (Great Sith War)|Battle of Yavin 4]], the forces of the Republic laid siege one last time to the fortressed Koros worlds, finally seizing control of the system, and scattering the Sith remnants there.

==Behind the scenes==
This battle is established by historical information provided in ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.
